test-case.description: computes the expiry date as lastRotated + rotationPolicyDays
test-case.name: Get-SecretStatus.computes the expiry date as lastRotated + rotationPolicyDays

test-case.description: classifies a long-past secret as expired
test-case.name: Get-SecretStatus.classifies a long-past secret as expired

test-case.description: classifies a secret inside the warning window as warning
test-case.name: Get-SecretStatus.classifies a secret inside the warning window as warning

test-case.description: classifies a secret outside the warning window as ok
test-case.name: Get-SecretStatus.classifies a secret outside the warning window as ok

test-case.description: treats a secret expiring exactly today as warning, not expired
test-case.name: Get-SecretStatus.treats a secret expiring exactly today as warning, not expired

test-case.description: throws a clear error when a required field is missing
test-case.name: Get-SecretStatus.throws a clear error when a required field is missing

test-case.description: groups secrets by urgency with correct summary counts
test-case.name: Get-SecretRotationReport.groups secrets by urgency with correct summary counts

test-case.description: produces zero counts for an empty input
test-case.name: Get-SecretRotationReport.produces zero counts for an empty input

test-case.description: records the asOf date and warning window on the report
test-case.name: Get-SecretRotationReport.records the asOf date and warning window on the report

test-case.description: renders markdown with grouped sections and a summary
test-case.name: Format-RotationReport.renders markdown with grouped sections and a summary

test-case.description: renders JSON that round-trips to the same shape as the report
test-case.name: Format-RotationReport.renders JSON that round-trips to the same shape as the report

test-case.description: rejects an unknown format with a clear error
test-case.name: Format-RotationReport.rejects an unknown format with a clear error

test-case.description: exits 0 and emits markdown by default
test-case.name: Invoke-SecretRotationValidator.ps1 (CLI).exits 0 and emits markdown by default

test-case.description: emits valid JSON when -Format json is given
test-case.name: Invoke-SecretRotationValidator.ps1 (CLI).emits valid JSON when -Format json is given

test-case.description: handles a config with an empty secrets array as JSON
test-case.name: Invoke-SecretRotationValidator.ps1 (CLI).handles a config with an empty secrets array as JSON

test-case.description: exits non-zero with a helpful error when the config file is missing
test-case.name: Invoke-SecretRotationValidator.ps1 (CLI).exits non-zero with a helpful error when the config file is missing

test-case.description: exits non-zero with a helpful error when the JSON is malformed
test-case.name: Invoke-SecretRotationValidator.ps1 (CLI).exits non-zero with a helpful error when the JSON is malformed
